surface_verification.justification: Data-only tighten of shipwright_bloat_baseline.json integer floors; no startable user-facing surface. The file is consumed only by the anti-ratchet pre-commit hook and the Group-H detective audit, both covered by passing unit tests (group_h 14, shared bloat/anti-ratchet 83).

test_completeness.justification: Trivial complexity: data-only tighten of 12 integer floors in shipwright_bloat_baseline.json (no code/behavior change). The H2 invariant (0 entries with actual < current) and the baseline's consumers are covered by group_h (14) + shared bloat/anti-ratchet (83) unit tests, all passing.
